ActiveXComponentProperty.Properties: <chart showValue="0" valueAbovePointer="1" pointerOnTop="1" showShadow="0" showTickMarks="1" showTickValues="1" ticksBelowGauge="1" showGaugeLabels="1" gaugeFillMix="{color}" showGaugeBorder="1" is3D="0" bgAlpha="0" showBorder="0" baseFont="Arial" captionOnTop="1" captionFontBold="1" subCaptionFontBold="1" alignCaptionWithCanvas="1" />

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR MPWStartingSroNum, VAR V(StartingSroNum), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR MPWEndingSroNum, VAR V(EndingSroNum), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR MatlPlannerWorkbenchGenSp.InfoBar, VAR , VAR 1, RVAR V(InfobarVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLPlants( DISTINCT() FILTER(Plant = FV(PlantVar)) SETV(MfgWhseVar=MfgWhse, WhseVar=MfgWhse) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge1_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(166) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) GAUGEALERTVALUE(1) )

Variable.Name: ehm1_DoProcess1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(DelPwbBatchVar), VAR V(UsePlnVar), VAR C(EndDateCombo), VAR V(SourceVar), VAR V(PlannerCode), VAR C(BuyerCombo), VAR C(WhseCombo), VAR V(ReplenishmentVar), VAR V(ThingsToProcessVar), VAR C(StartingItemCombo), VAR C(EndingItemCombo), VAR C(StartingOrderCombo), VAR C(EndingOrderCombo), VAR C(StartingProjectCombo), VAR C(EndingProjectCombo), VAR C(StartingTransferCombo), VAR C(EndingTransferCombo), VAR C(StartingJobCombo), VAR C(EndingJobCombo), VAR C(StartingJobSuffixEdit), VAR C(Endin

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(DelPwbBatchVar), VAR V(UsePlnVar), VAR C(EndDateCombo), VAR V(SourceVar), VAR V(PlannerCode), VAR C(BuyerCombo), VAR C(WhseCombo), VAR V(ReplenishmentVar), VAR V(ThingsToProcessVar), VAR C(StartingItemCombo), VAR C(EndingItemCombo), VAR C(StartingOrderCombo), VAR C(EndingOrderCombo), VAR C(StartingProjectCombo), VAR C(EndingProjectCombo), VAR C(StartingTransferCombo), VAR C(EndingTransferCombo), VAR C(StartingJobCombo), VAR C(EndingJobCombo), VAR C(StartingJobSuffixEdit), VAR C(Endin

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' Disables the 200 record limit that Mongoose has for returned collections
' Deselect All Options by default | CHris Hill - 18/10/2024
' Can't use CallGlobalScript.MsgApp, because VBA doesn't support Unicode
